excerpt: **STRATEGIC SYNTHESIS** The **Tail Risk Bear** scenario, supported by 7 out of 10 simulations with a correlation coefficient of 0.7, is the strongest minority view. This scenario is driven by the growing risk of a "non-linear spike" in oil prices and...
